nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as 'Devices'FROM (FROM XMLRPC SELECT count(*) as 'RPS Offline Count' where id like 'RPS%' and online='0' FACET store.number, id limit max) WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago
FROM XMLRPC SELECT uniqueCount(id) as 'Devices' WHERE node = 'FOE' AND online = '0' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago

FROM XMLRPC SELECT uniqueCount(id) as 'Devices' WHERE node = 'FOE' AND string(businessDate) = string(WayBusinessDay) AND WayState = 'OPEN' AND state != 'Logged' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago

FROM (SELECT count(*) > 1 as 'count' from XMLRPC where string(WayBusinessDay) != string(businessDate) and node='FOE' facet  toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date', store.number as 'Store', node as 'Node', id as 'ID', ip as 'IP', type as 'Type', WayBusinessDay as 'Way Business Day', businessDate AS 'Business Date' limit max) SELECT count(*) as 'Devices' WHERE count is true AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago limit max

FROM XMLRPC SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date'
WHERE id like 'RPS%' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}'
FACET cases(where online = 1 as 'ONLINE', online = 0 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', id as 'RPS ID'
SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

WITH (SELECT aggregationendtime() from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration
FROM NrAiIncident SELECT (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'
WHERE incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) FROM NrAiIncident WHERE conditionName like 'rps offline' AND event = 'close' AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago) AND conditionName like 'rps offline' AND event = 'open' AND ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}'
SINCE 1 day ago FACET incidentLink, tags.Store as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'RPS ID' LIMIT MAX

FROM XMLRPC SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date'
WHERE node = 'FOE' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}'
FACET cases(where online = 1 as 'ONLINE', online = 0 as 'OFFLINE') as 'State', id as 'FOE ID'
SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

WITH (SELECT aggregationendtime() from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration
FROM NrAiIncident select (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'
WHERE incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) FROM NrAiIncident WHERE conditionName like 'foe offline' AND event = 'close' AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago) AND conditionName like 'foe offline' AND event = 'open' AND ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}'
SINCE 1 day ago FACET incidentLink, tags.Store as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' LIMIT MAX

FROM XMLRPC SELECT latest(toDateTime(timestamp, 'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm')) as 'Date'
WHERE node = 'FOE' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}'
FACET state as 'State', id as 'FOE ID'
SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

WITH (SELECT aggregationendtime() from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration
FROM NrAiIncident SELECT (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'
WHERE incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) FROM NrAiIncident WHERE conditionName like 'foe not with logged in state' AND event = 'close' AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago) AND conditionName like 'foe not with logged in state' AND event = 'open' AND ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}'
SINCE 1 day ago FACET incidentLink, tags.Store as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: FOE Devices Business Date Differs from Way Station

nrqlQueries.query: FROM (SELECT count(*) > 1 as 'count' from XMLRPC where string(WayBusinessDay) != string(businessDate) and node='FOE' facet  toDateTime(timestamp,'MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm') as 'Date', store.number as 'Store', id as 'ID', ip as 'IP', type as 'Type', WayBusinessDay as 'Way Business Day', businessDate AS 'Business Date') SELECT Date as 'Date (UTC)', Store, ID as 'FOE ID', `Way Business Day`, `Business Date`, timestamp WHERE count is true AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: FOE Business Date Differs from Way Station Open Incidents

nrqlQueries.query:
WITH (SELECT aggregationendtime() from NrAiIncident since 1 hour ago) as duration
FROM NrAiIncident SELECT (duration - latest(openTime)) / 1000 / 60 as 'Duration (Minutes)'
WHERE incidentId NOT IN (SELECT uniques(incidentId,10000) FROM NrAiIncident WHERE conditionName like 'foe with different business date than way station' AND event = 'close' AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}' SINCE 1 day ago) AND conditionName like 'foe with different business date than way station' AND event = 'open' AND ((duration - openTime) / 1000 / 60) > 30 AND tags.Store = '{{tags.store.number}}'
SINCE 1 day ago FACET incidentLink, tags.Store as 'Store Number', tags.ID as 'FOE ID' LIMIT MAX
